changes: Phase 5a — NEW REPO: fakebranden/fga-marketing-template (public, GitHub template). Seeded from fga-site-travelin-toms-coffee, fully parameterized — every client-specific string lifted to brand-config.json (nested contact{}, socials{}, a2p{}, ghl{}). SEO+AEO baseline files inherited (seo.ts w/ niche-subtype lookup, sitemap.ts, robots.ts, llms.txt stubs). A2P compliance files inherited (SmsConsent, /api/book audit trail, Privacy mobile-info carve-out, Terms § 6 SMS section). Zero client-reference leaks. is_template=true verified.

Phase 5a — scripts/enforce-a2p.mjs: build-blocking checker — grep src/**/*.{ts,tsx} for <input type="tel" without <SmsConsent in same file → exit 1 with offending file. Fixture-tested both fail + pass cases. Wired into npm run build.

Phase 5a — .github/workflows/generate-marketing.yml: full workflow_dispatch with site_slug + hub_base inputs. Vercel-author-locked to 201860651+fakebranden@users.noreply.github.com. End-to-end: hub fetch → npm ci → install-registry-deps → extract-tokens → generate-pages → enforce-a2p → npm run build → commit → trigger-vercel-deploy → hub PATCH.
Phase 5a — AGENTS.md + README.md + CLAUDE.md docs.

Phase 5b — fga-ai-demo NEW: src/lib/marketing-site-store.ts (Upstash Redis backing, MarketingSite type, idempotent appendHistory). src/lib/marketing-site-generation.ts (n8n webhook fire-and-forget). POST /api/employee-hub/marketing-site/generate (employee-session auth, niche+reference_style validation, 409 on slug collision). GET/PATCH /api/employee-hub/marketing-site/[slug] (dual auth, status-change auto-history).

Phase 5c — fga-ai-demo NEW: src/lib/fga-pro-max-skill-block.ts (~340 lines). composeSkillBlock(input) — reads local skill repo, resolves niche, summarises seed tokens, falls back to fga-canonical, enforces per-substrate budgets (2k/3k/1k) with [TRIMMED] markers. Returns { used, niche, reference_style, systemPromptInject, budget }. Skill-dir missing → silent no-op.

Phase 5c — fga-ai-demo MOD: src/lib/ai-edit.ts (planEdit + generateEdits gain optional systemPromptExtras param). src/app/api/employee-hub/sites/[slug]/ai-edit/route.ts (useSkill body flag, ENV-GATED via FGA_PRO_MAX_DEFAULT_ON, default OFF for 48h soak, SSE event { type: "data", key: "skill" } for editor UI badge, skillExtras threaded into ALL THREE model calls including the retry).

Phase 5d (n8n WF-MARKETING-SITE-GEN) DEFERRED to a follow-up session — per n8n patch protocol, prod workflow changes get their own session with backup → mutate-in-place → validate → publish discipline; not bundled with feature work.

Phase 5e — fga-marketing-template NEW: scripts/generate-pages.mjs (302 lines) — Claude Agent SDK driver. Reads site.json + brand-config.json, merges overrides, loads skill substrate, composes per-page system prompt (skill block + per-page contract), calls claude-sonnet-4-6 via @anthropic-ai/sdk, extracts TSX from fenced block, writes src/app/<route>/page.tsx. PATCHes hub at every status transition.

Phase 5e — prompts/ directory: home.md, about.md, terms.md, privacy.md, book.md + README. Per-page contracts with {{business_name}}/{{niche}} interpolation. terms.md + privacy.md A2P-locked (carrier-matched sample messages, mobile-info carve-out).
Phase 5e — package.json: @anthropic-ai/sdk@^0.34.0 added as runtime dep.

Brand-kit schema extensions in fga-ai-demo: HarvestBrandKit gains reference_style? / reference_style_url? / niche? / tokens? (with new TokenSet type). GeneratedSite gains reference_style? / reference_style_url? / niche?. All optional, backward-compatible.

Phase 8 — Multi-part reel series: harvest-recipes.ts gains fga-pro-max-tip-series recipe + RecipeSeries + RecipeOutro types + Recipe.series/outro/sourceFocus optionals. harvest-style-presets.ts gains 'Design · FGA Pro Max Tip Reel' preset (full-bleed yellow #f6eb1e bg, italic-serif hooks + bold-sans captions, per-syllable cuts, lower-third talking head). FGA_PRO_MAX_SEED_SERIES const with 3 seeded series (fga-component-libs-5, fga-ghl-plumber-5, fga-lounge-mistakes-5).

Phase 2 — Component substrate: pinned SHAs for all 7 libraries (cult-ui MIT, aceternity Proprietary-EndProduct, skiper-ui MIT, watermelon MIT, styleui MIT, componentry MIT w/ GSAP caveat, dotmatrix Proprietary-EndProduct). License audit gates passed for watermelon + styleui. Recipe table resolved against live registries — every component name verified against actual library catalogs (substitutions documented in per-section notes).
Phase 2 — scripts/install-registry-deps.mjs: niche-aware shadcn-registry installer with idempotency tracking, --dry-run mode, streaming pnpm output.
Phase 2 — registry/LICENSES.md: full license audit doc with per-library terms + Phase 2 exit-gate verdicts.
Phase 2 — recipes/README.md: lexicographic conflict resolution table (aceternity < componentry < cult-ui < dotmatrix < skiper-ui < styleui < watermelon).

Phase 3 — Design taste layer: 8 reference seeds filled with curated tokens (Stripe purple gradient, Apple SF Pro + true black, ElevenLabs cyan/violet glow, Resend cream+Geist mono, Linear violet dark canvas, Sweetgreen earth+vegetal, Blue Bottle navy+cream, Eleven Madison Park emerald+serif). 7+ colors / 2+ fonts / 4+ spacing+radii / 4+ anti-patterns each.
Phase 3 — tokens/tokens.schema.json: JSON Schema draft-07 with key-pattern enforcement on --color-<adj>-<noun> + --font-(display|body|mono|accent)-<name>.
Phase 3 — scripts/extract-tokens.mjs: Playwright extractor with HSL→adjective-noun heuristic. Lazy-imports playwright; graceful fail w/ install instructions if missing.
Phase 3 — tokens/README.md: token naming dictionary appended (color buckets, hue map, typography slots, spacing+radii pool, 4 cross-seed rules).

Phase 4 — Niche reasoning: 9 niches filled w/ concrete decision-rules (do/never/typography mood/key effect/copy patterns/CTA patterns/anti-patterns/A2P variants/token affinity). Bronx Havana Room + Five Bucks (lounge), Bronx Havana Cafe (restaurant-bar), Travelin Tom's (mobile-food-truck), Appliance Plug (appliance-retail), FGA self (agency-b2b), plus med-spa-aesthetic, plumber-hvac, auto-detail-mobile, barber-salon.
Phase 4 — _PROMOTE.md: one-off rule promotion path doc (operator marks rule → monthly review → bar=worked-on-≥2-sites → demotion path if it stops working).
Token-budget check: every niche file ~1,265-1,505 tokens — half-budget headroom for future promotions.
Naming + paths corrected: aceternity (not 'acternity'), skiper-ui /registry/ (not /r/), watermelon registry.watermelon.sh (not ui.watermelon.sh/r), cult-ui www-prefix (not apex).
Initial scaffold — skill.json, SKILL.md, activation triggers
Directory structure for all 3 substrates (registry/, tokens/, reasoning/)
Seed FGA-canonical token set (jet-anchor, paper-base, electric-canary, etc.)
9 niche reasoning rule stubs (content fleshed in Phase 4)
8 reference style seed stubs (content extracted in Phase 3)
Release pipeline with JSON schema validation
Contributor docs (CLAUDE.md, ARCHITECTURE.md, ROADMAP.md)
